title: eragrostis sambiranensis
intro: Eragrostis sambiranensis, also known as a species of grass, is a type of plant native to Madagascar. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis sambiranensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is often dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
